title: hieracium dolichosphaericum
intro: Hieracium dolichosphaericum, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium dolichosphaericum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to soothe skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Hieracium dolichosphericum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
